channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: On a testé le Shwette Baggy, un petit vélo cargo électrique français qui a presque tout d’un grand
item.description: Véritablement polyvalent malgré une taille réduite, le vélo cargo électrique Shwette Baggy offre une alternative intéressante dans la catégorie des biporteurs, avec une agréable assistance Virvolt. Nous l'avons testé, voici notre verdict.

item.title: Asus’ new open earbuds are a wonderful companion for handheld gaming
item.description: The Cetra Open Wireless aren’t like most other gaming earbuds. They’re large, with an open-style design that rests just outside of your ears, letting game audio mix with sounds in your environment. These allow for immersion, but only if your environment is quiet enough. And turning them up might let those nearby hear what you’re […]

item.title: How to use the new ChatGPT app integrations, including DoorDash, Spotify, Uber, and others
item.description: Learn how to use Spotify, Canva, Figma, Expedia, and other apps directly in ChatGPT.

item.title: Project Hail Mary directors Phil Lord and Chris Miller reveal the 4 best sci-fi movies they've seen — and one is a John Carpenter film you've never heard of
item.description: The filmmakers behind Ryan Gosling's new sci-fi movie highlight four genre works for you to watch before their latest big-screen project.

item.title: How to watch Wales vs Italy: Free Streams & TV Channels as Steve Tandy's side look to avoid wooden spoon
item.description: All the ways to watch Wales vs Italy live streams online – including for FREE – as the hosts look to end their Six Nations campaign with a win.

item.title: Michael Caine and Matthew McConaughey have licensed their voices to AI — but not every ‘iconic’ voice on the platform can consent
item.description: ElevenLabs is turning celebrity voices into licensed products — but the real cost goes far beyond your audiobook.

item.title: Ce laptop Lenovo avec un Core i7, 16 Go de RAM et un SSD de 1 To profite d’une belle réduction de 220 € sur Amazon
item.description: Le Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3 16IRH10 est un PC portable tout indiqué pour un usage polyvalent, aussi bien comme machine familiale que comme PC de bureau, disponible pour 629,99 euros au lieu de 849,99 euros.

item.title: The UK just spent £180 million to make sure it's telling the time correctly — but it could also be the key to ensuring AI, 5G, and more all work properly
item.description: The UK invests £180 million in atomic clocks to build a national timing network that supports AI, 5G, and infrastructure.

item.title: 'It’s ironic, because what we were trying to do, store data on the internet - and do it really, really well - was not so simple': Celebrating 20 years of Amazon S3
item.description: It may be 20 years old, but Amazon's popular cloud storage service shows no signs of slowing down.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra review: show off
item.description: "Someone might be watching everything I'm doing on my screen," I tell myself in public. Even when I'm doing nothing of consequence - just making my little Wordle guesses - there's a sense of unease that stays with me. It's never bothered me too much, and I generally save the sensitive stuff like banking for […]

item.title: 5 great indie games from GDC 2026
item.description: I just got back from the GDC Festival of Gaming, a big industry-focused event in San Francisco that was formerly known as the Game Developers Conference. While the show is mostly about educational sessions and networking opportunities for working developers, there were also a bunch of games that I got to play. Here are some […]

item.title: Wordle’s creator made a fun new puzzle game
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 119, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, hope your agents are well, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about Pixar's future and flight MH370 and sports gambling […]

item.title: ‘Everything seemed to go right’: Kurt Russell might ‘never make his peace’ with Tombstone — but The Madison on Paramount+ is his Western redemption
item.description: New Paramount+ show The Madison marks Kurt Russell’s triumphant return to the Western genre — and he’s convinced it’s the ‘best thing’ Taylor Sheridan has ever made.

item.title: Sunderland vs Brighton Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025-26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: We'll show you how to watch Sunderland vs Brighton live streams from anywhere in the world as both teams target maximum points at the Stadium of Light

item.title: The MacBook Neo is 'the best budget laptop you can buy' — and Amazon's already offering a small price cut
item.description: Can any model beat the MacBook Neo for value right now? Not with Amazon's first-ever discount on this excellent budget model.

item.title: How to Buy Used or Refurbished Electronics (2026)
item.description: Save money and reduce your carbon footprint with these tips to snag the best deals on quality refurbished and used electronics.

item.title: Samsung, Oppo, Apple… qui est le champion de l’optimisation de la batterie ? Le verdict du 01lab
item.description: Les batteries en silicium carbone sont de plus en plus courantes dans les smartphones, surtout sur les modèles hauts de gamme. Ce nouveau type de batterie offre une densité plus importante et permet l'arrivée de nouveaux records d'autonomie. Mais ces nouvelles performances ne cachent-elles pas une mauvaise optimisation énergétique ? La question se pose. Vérifions cela ensemble avec les tests du 01lab....
